productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Deschutz Black Sandals
description: It's all about exemplary comfort with the nike Air Deschutz floaters. Crafted with adjustable soft twill straps and a cushioned footbed to deliver a snug Fit, you are ready to walk comfortably on any terrain.UpperTwill straps on the forefoot, midfoot and around the ankle, with velcro closures and buckles to offer a customised fitFabric padding along the straps for abrasion-free comfortHaul loop at the back strap to hang the floaters from a backpackErgonomically curved PU footbed with massage nubs for all-day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with strategically placed lugs for optimum grip and tractionFlex grooves for ease of movementScooped heel for cushioned comfort to the backfootSandal careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
